taxonomy: Poteranthera gracillima is classified within the family Saxifragaceae. It belongs to the genus Poteranthera. The species Poteranthera gracillima is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. It is a member of the order Saxifragales. This flowering plant is also known as a saxifrage.
